stories.title: FIA April 9 Summit — Three Days Away, Six Fixes on the Table

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The FIA April 9 summit is THREE DAYS AWAY. 🔥

On the table: raise super clipping 250→350kW, cut energy 9→7MJ, scrap fixed aero zones.

Unanimous agreement required. Goal: fixes before Miami May 3.

This is the most important meeting in F1 this year.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Hamilton: skeptical the FIA can fix it in time.
Sainz: pushing hard for Miami changes.
Bearman: 10 penalty points from a crash CAUSED by this exact problem. 👀

April 9. The whole paddock is watching.

#F1Fanrecap #F1

article.headline: FIA April 9 Summit: Six Regulation Fixes, Three Days, and a Unanimous Agreement Needed

stories.title: Antonelli Leads Championship During 5-Week Break — Youngest Leader in F1 History

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Andrea Kimi Antonelli is 19 years old.

He leads the F1 World Championship by 9 points.

He just broke Lewis Hamilton's record as the youngest championship leader in F1 history.

Five weeks until Miami. The kid is not stressed. 👀

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Antonelli

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Championship standings entering the 5-week break:

ANT: 72 pts 🥇
RUS: 63 pts
LEC: 49 pts
HAM: 41 pts

Mercedes leads constructors 135-90 over Ferrari.

The 2026 F1 season is Antonelli's to lose.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Mercedes

article.headline: Antonelli Leads F1's Longest Break as the Youngest Championship Leader in History

stories.title: Verstappen and Red Bull's Miami Moment of Truth — Can the Three-Stage Fix Work?

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Red Bull TP Mekies on Miami: "There will be no miracle turnaround."

Verstappen is 9th in the championship with 12 points.

Four-time world champion. Three races in. NINTH.

Stage 1 of 3 fix plan arrives at Miami. It better work. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #RedBull #F1

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The RB22 is reportedly 10kg overweight.

Hadjar has out-qualified Verstappen multiple times.

The Miami floor + PU map update is Red Bull's first real test.

Verstappen hasn't finished in the top 5 once in 2026. Let that sink in.

#F1Fanrecap #Verstappen #F1

article.headline: Red Bull's Miami Moment of Truth: 'No Miracle Turnaround' as Three-Stage Fix Begins

stories.title: Ferrari's Monza Test 16 Days Away — The Macarena Wing's Miami Debut

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Ferrari's Monza test is 16 days away. 🏎️

Macarena wing. New floor. Revised PU software.

If ADUO works as expected, Ferrari could close ~20bhp on Mercedes.

Hamilton and Leclerc get their first feel of the Miami spec.

#F1Fanrecap #Ferrari #F1

article.headline: Ferrari's Monza Test in 16 Days: The Macarena Wing, ADUO Power Unit, and Miami's Three-Point Plan

stories.title: Bearman's Zero-Margin Situation — 10 Penalty Points, Miami Could Trigger Auto Ban

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Oliver Bearman heads into Miami with 10 penalty points.

Auto ban threshold: 12 points.

Earliest expiry: May 23 — AFTER Miami.

He earned those points from a crash CAUSED by the regulatory flaw the FIA is now trying to fix.

Zero margin for error. 😬

#F1Fanrecap #Haas #F1

article.headline: Bearman's Miami Tightrope: 10 Penalty Points, Two From a Ban, and No Margin for Error

stories.title: McLaren's 10-Change Miami Upgrade — Can Norris Bridge the 45-Point Gap?

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
McLaren is bringing a 10-change upgrade to Miami. 🏎️

They won Miami in 2024 AND 2025.

Norris is 47 points behind Antonelli. Piastri is 51 back.

If this upgrade lands, the title fight just got a lot more interesting. 👀

#F1Fanrecap #McLaren #F1

stories.title: Miami GP Preview — Round 4, Sprint Format, May 1-3

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
MIAMI GP countdown: 25 days. 🏁

Round 4 — Sprint format weekend.
May 1: FP1
May 2: Sprint
May 3: Race

Previous winners: Verstappen (×2), Norris, Piastri.

Can Antonelli make it 3 wins in 4 races? We're about to find out.

#F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP #F1
